text: In Direct connections of Flanged connections, For all piping except open ended, what restrictions is applied?

options.text: For design temperatures colder than minus 55°C, only welded threaded flanges shall be used
For design temperatures colder than minus 55°C, only welded lap flanges shall be used
For design temperatures colder than minus 55°C, only welded neck flanges shall be used
For design temperatures colder than minus 55°C, only welded slip on flanges shall be used
